nasb.text: The anointed priest who will be in his place among his sons shall offer it. By a permanent ordinance it shall be entirely offered up in smoke to the Lord.

esv.text: The priest from among Aaron’s sons, who is anointed to succeed him, shall offer it to the Lord as decreed forever. The whole of it shall be burned.

cnv.text: 亞倫的子孫繼承他作受膏立的祭司的，都要獻這素祭，把它完全焚燒，獻給耶和華，作永遠的律例。

ccb.text: 亚伦子孙中继任大祭司的，受膏时要献上素祭。这种祭物属于耶和华，必须全部烧掉。
